name: O.R.C. Stinkbug
description: The O.R.C. Stinkbug is a control-oriented stinkbug turned into an area-denial platform. It still mixes physical hits with gas, but the O.R.C. version manages space better and punishes bad positioning much harder.
behavior: It patrols important relays and entrances, using gas as a control tool before it is just damage. It does not reposition much, but it fills the space with clouds to force you into fighting on its terms.
interactionWithPlayer: It becomes hostile instantly and turns the surrounding ground into a terrible place to hold a fight. If you do not bring an answer to the gas, every spacing error snowballs fast.
interactionWithCreatures: It usually supports O.R.C. transmitters and patrols as a heavy control unit, forcing other creatures to cross its gas if they want to close in.
strategy: Fresh still helps, but the main rule is not to stay inside the clouds. Block the bite, leave the area after each leap, and only step back in once the gas leaves you a clear route.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Bite: 62.5. Gas Leap: 81.25. General Diesel Bite: 75. Heavy Gas Leap: 93.75.

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: A direct bite used to punish you for fighting too close to the gas cloud.

abilities.name: Gas Leap
abilities.description: It leaps and lands in a burst of gas that forces you to reposition.

abilities.name: General Diesel Bite
abilities.description: A harsher bite variant reserved for the stronger named version.

abilities.name: Heavy Gas Leap
abilities.description: A stronger leap variant that punishes poor spacing even harder.
